_source: idea-engine control/outbox.md PROPOSAL 040 · 2026-07-13T17:19:39Z · status: sim-ready (the source of truth; idea doc ideas/fleet/schelling-mild-preference-tipping-2026-07-13.md @ idea-engine main 25b1798). Every constant below copied verbatim from the block. Committed BEFORE the runner (git-trail discipline). Fully hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this file.

population.composition: 45/45/10, conservation of all three counts recounted at every sweep end

satisfaction.rule: SATISFIED iff like-fraction among OCCUPIED neighbors >= tau, tested in exact integers as like * tau_den >= tau_num * occ
satisfaction.zero_occupied_neighbors: SATISFIED (vacuous contentment - the convention that biases AGAINST amplification)

initialization: the pinned 1,600-entry label list in construction order [720 x A, then 720 x B, then 160 x vacant], then ONE rng.shuffle -> the starting grid

dynamics.sweep: (a) collect currently occupied cell indices ASCENDING and rng.shuffle them; (b) process agents in that order, each evaluating against the LIVE grid at its turn; (c) an unsatisfied agent relocates to a uniformly random vacant cell - destination = the current vacant-cell list in ASCENDING index order, position drawn by rng.randrange(len(vacancies)) - its old cell becomes vacant immediately
dynamics.rng: stdlib random.Random(seed), ONE generator per leg, pinned draw order: init shuffle -> per-sweep order shuffle -> one randrange per relocation; per-leg draw counts sentinel-checked

termination.fixation: a full sweep with zero relocations, independently re-certified by a separately written satisfaction scan (zero unsatisfied required)
termination.cap_censoring: a cap-terminated run's s is recorded but CAP-CENSORED for decision purposes via the validity conjunct - never silently averaged in

runs.loop_order: tau ascending, run index 0..M-1, all runs of a leg drawn from that leg's single generator in pinned order

metric: s(tau) = per-run exact-Fraction mean, over agents with >= 1 occupied neighbor, of like/occ at termination; decision number = MEDIAN of the 32 main-leg run values at tau = 3/10 = mean of the 16th/17th order statistics (exact rational)

seeds.registry_note: allocated strictly above the P039 high-water 20261296; new registry high-water 20261300

decision_rule.order: evaluated IN THIS ORDER, REJECT FIRST; bands exact rationals, disjoint by construction; BOTH bands carry the validity conjunct
decision_rule.validity_conjunct: fewer than 1/4 of the 32 decision-cell runs are cap-censored (cap_count * 4 < 32); a band whose conjunct fails cannot fire and the outcome falls through to NULL with non-convergence the named binding axis
decision_rule.approve: median s(3/10) >= 7/10 AND the seed-20261298 stability leg reproduces the SAME ruling under the identical rule (its own median >= 7/10 and its own validity conjunct passing)
decision_rule.null: anything else - binding axis named from the pre-registered four: (i) band straddle, median in [11/20, 7/10); (ii) non-convergence (validity conjunct failed at the decision cell); (iii) stability non-reproduction; (iv) vacancy-sensitivity flip (reporting-only - names the axis, cannot flip the decision)
decision_rule.null_probe_pre_priced: re-run ONLY the tau = 3/10 cell at sweep cap 2,000 on the reserved aux seed 20261300 - one cell, zero new tooling

control_leg_tau0.expect: EXACTLY zero relocations (no agent is ever unsatisfied at tau = 0), and every run's initial-placement s inside the baseline band

cells_in_pinned_order.name: grid-N25
cells_in_pinned_order.rounding: floor(0.45 * N^2) = 281 each, remainder 63 to vacancies

reporting_leg.status: reporting-only - CANNOT flip the decision; the vacancy pair landing on opposite sides of a band edge names vacancy supply as the binding axis

monotonicity_audit.expectation: main-leg mean s(tau) non-decreasing in tau across {1/8, 1/4, 3/10, 3/8, 1/2}
monotonicity_audit.on_violation: does NOT invalidate (high-tau non-convergence can bend it) but is printed as a first-class anomaly line

hand_fixture_4x4.note: pinned 4x4 torus configuration with HAND-computed occupied/like counts for all 16 cells (derived by hand at fixture-commit time, before the runner exists); guards neighborhood + wraparound arithmetic. Labels: A / B / V(acant), row-major.

reporting_only_columns: satisfied-agent fraction; interface density (unlike occupied-adjacent pairs / all occupied-adjacent pairs) at termination; sweeps-to-fixation quartiles and cap-hit counts per cell; every main-leg tau cell except 3/10

boundaries.family_of_dynamics: results rule on THIS update rule/grid/composition only: live random-serial order, uniform-random vacant destinations, 40x40 Moore-8 torus, 45/45/10; the satisfying-destination flip is the named most-likely-to-flip follow-up; graded utilities, unequal groups, von Neumann neighborhoods, open boundaries, noise/swap dynamics all out of scope
boundaries.termination: s measured at fixation or cap; cap-censoring handled by the validity conjunct, never silently averaged in
boundaries.measurement: s is a LOCAL mixing metric - 'strong segregation' is operationalized as s >= 7/10 on this metric; global cluster indices ride reporting-only as interface density
